Vendored from `https://github.com/cyberphone/json-canonicalization`

- Upstream commit: `19d51d7fe467d4706a3ff08adf8a748f29fc21e0`
- Imported on: 2026-04-04
- License: Apache-2.0

RuneCode uses this package as a pinned local snapshot behind repository-owned wrappers so
trusted runtime hashing stays aligned with RFC 8785 JCS without introducing a live module
dependency on the upstream repository layout.
